container.hint: a generic block-level container for grouping and styling content

wrapper.hint: a generic block-level container for grouping and styling content

box.hint: a generic block-level container for grouping and styling content

block.hint: a generic block-level container for grouping and styling content

heading.hint: a top-level heading (h1 through h6 exist for different levels)

bold.hint: marking text as strongly important, which browsers render bold by default

italic.hint: marking text with emphasis, which browsers render italic by default

list.hint: an unordered (bulleted) list, use ol instead if the order matters

listitem.hint: a single item inside a ul or ol list

item.hint: a single item inside a ul or ol list

break.hint: inserting a line break inside text

linebreak.hint: inserting a line break inside text

newline.hint: inserting a line break inside text

line.hint: a thematic break or horizontal rule, a visible dividing line

divider.hint: a thematic break or horizontal rule, a visible dividing line

separator.hint: a thematic break or horizontal rule, a visible dividing line

rule.hint: a thematic break or horizontal rule, a visible dividing line

sidebar.hint: content that is tangentially related to the main content, like a sidebar

field.hint: an interactive form control for user input

checkbox.hint: an interactive form control. For a checkbox specifically, use input with type="checkbox"

player.hint: embedding a video (or audio for embedding audio)
